description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in matte black with subtle green accents. The ear cups are large and oval-shaped, featuring plush padding for comfort, and the headband is wide and cushioned for extended wear. The exterior of each ear cup displays a circular emblem with a stylized logo, illuminated by a green LED ring, suggesting a gaming or high-performance audio brand. The headphones appear to be constructed from a combination of plastic and synthetic leather, with visible metal reinforcements in the headband for durability. The overall build is robust yet lightweight, suitable for portable use in urban environments. No visible wires indicate a likely wireless or Bluetooth functionality, and there are no obvious physical buttons or dials, implying touch or gesture controls.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones in matte black with green LED accents and a logo on each ear cup. The design is sleek, cushioned, and likely intended for high-performance audio or gaming.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular ear cup with a green LED ring and logo, highlighting the thickness and padding of the ear cup.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both oval ear cups and the wide, cushioned headband, emphasizing the symmetrical and ergonomic design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the other ear cup with the same green LED ring and logo.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of both ear cups and the arch of the headband, with visible padding and the overall curvature.
